title: The False Step
writer: Theodor Fontane, Georg C. Klaren, Eckart von Naso
actors: Marianne Hoppe, Karl Ludwig Diehl, Paul Hartmann
plot: A very young girl is married to a older Baron, the commissioner of the county. With the duty clashing with love, he can't give her the attention she needs. A retired Major, as old as her husband, is ready to give company. When the...
